user.title: Generac MobileLink
user.description: Sign in with your Mobile Link account.

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate Generac MobileLink
reauth_confirm.description: The session for {username} has expired. Enter your password to refresh it.

mfa.title: Two-factor authentication
mfa.description: Your Generac account requires a verification code. Enter the code sent to you via {method}.

error.mfa_invalid: That code was incorrect or has expired. Enter the most recent code, or cancel and start over to get a new one.
error.mfa_unsupported: Your account uses a two-factor method this integration can't complete automatically (such as a push notification or security key). Approve the login in the MobileLink app, or switch your Generac/ecobee account to SMS, email, or authenticator-app codes, then try again.
error.auth0_unreachable: Could not reach auth.ecobee.com. Check the HA host's outbound network/DNS.
error.auth0_step_authorize: Auth0 /authorize step failed — the universal-login entry point did not accept our request. Check Settings → System → Logs for the 'Generac auth: step=authorize' line, then report at github.com/pjordanandrsn/ha-generac.
error.auth0_step_login_form: Auth0 login form (identifier or password) returned an unexpected response. The form fields or flow may have changed. Check the HA log for 'POST .../login/' lines.
error.auth0_step_resume: Auth0 /authorize/resume step failed — login appeared to succeed but the resume redirect was malformed. Check the HA log for 'Generac auth: step=resume' line.
error.auth0_redirect: Auth0 returned an unexpected redirect. Check the HA log for 'Generac auth:' lines and report at github.com/pjordanandrsn/ha-generac.
error.code_exchange: Auth0 accepted login but rejected the token exchange (DPoP/PKCE). Check the HA log and report at github.com/pjordanandrsn/ha-generac.
error.internal: Unexpected error. Check Settings → System → Logs for the full traceback and report at github.com/pjordanandrsn/ha-generac.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only a single instance is allowed.
abort.entry_not_found: The configuration entry no longer exists.
abort.mfa_unsupported: Your account uses a two-factor method this integration can't complete automatically (such as a push notification or security key). Approve the login in the MobileLink app, or switch your Generac/ecobee account to SMS, email, or authenticator-app codes, then try again.
abort.mfa_failed: Two-factor verification couldn't be completed. Start setup again to request a new code.
